message:
test(conformance): add strict centrality and matching golden fixtures

Add 10 new conformance golden fixtures for directed algorithm validation:

Centrality fixtures (8):
- centrality_betweenness_petersen_strict.json
- centrality_closeness_turan_strict.json
- centrality_degree_petersen_strict.json
- centrality_eigenvector_wheel_strict.json
- centrality_harmonic_grid_strict.json
- centrality_hits_ladder_strict.json
- centrality_katz_barbell_strict.json
- centrality_pagerank_barabasi_strict.json

Matching fixtures (2):
- matching_max_weight_large_strict.json
- matching_min_weight_bipartite_strict.json

Each fixture captures expected values from NetworkX reference
implementation for strict parity validation against franken_networkx.
Update conformance test metadata to include new fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
